items.descriptionHtml:
Discovery team:

The Commerce Discovery Team is the engine of our "Digital First" transformation. We are responsible for the entry point of our entire commerce ecosystem—defining how millions of customers find, evaluate, and buy products. Our goal is to move away from fragmented legacy systems toward a world-class, unified commerce core that powers a seamless experience across Web, App, and Assisted channels (Call Centres and Retail).


Our Strategic Vision:

We are on an exciting journey—from being a tech-enabled organization to becoming a

tech-first company, where technology is at the core of everything we do. This

transformation opens up new business models and untapped revenue streams, all

while leveraging our massive user base to deliver value at scale.



Innovative Products in Development:

We are focused on building forward-looking solutions that offer tangible value:

  • Magenta Moments: A personalized loyalty and offers program that boosts user engagement with exclusive, time-sensitive deals.
  • Fintech Solutions & Advertising: Unlocking new revenue via data-driven advertising models and integrated payment systems.


Role Overview:

We are looking for a Builder-at-Heart. As the Director of Product for Discovery, you aren’t just a manager of roadmaps; you are a practitioner who thrives on technical complexity. You are a strategist who understands B2C psychology, an e-commerce expert who knows how to scale platforms, and a leader who is willing to get their hands dirty to drive highly complex, organization-wide projects to the finish line.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Drive the North Star: You are accountable for Digital Sales Coverage and Customer NPS. Your success is measured by creating a frictionless experience that drives repeat behavior and long-term loyalty, not just a one-time transaction.
  • Architectural Ownership: Lead the evolution of our e-commerce platforms from 0-to-1 and 1-to-100. Oversee the high-stakes transition from fragmented legacy environments to a modern, high-speed unified architecture.
  • World-Class Team Architect: You are responsible for building a high-performance product organization from the ground up. This involves:
  • Hiring with a High Bar: Actively sourcing and recruiting the top 1% of product talent.
  • Active Mentorship: Elevating the "Product Craft" of your team through hands-on coaching and setting clear career trajectories.
  • Performance Rigor: Having the decisiveness to "weed off" misfits or underperformers who do not meet the team's pace, quality, or cultural standards.
  • Multi-Geo Stakeholder Diplomacy: Navigate and lead product strategy across multi-cultural teams. You must be able to drive alignment across diverse stakeholders, ensuring a global standard of excellence while respecting local market nuances.
  • Hands-on Execution: We need a leader who can move from a high-level board presentation to a deep-dive technical session. You will directly steer the most complex, high-impact projects.



Ideal Candidate Attributes:

  • B2C & E-Commerce Scale: 12+ years of experience building high-traffic B2C products and a proven track record of scaling large-scale e-commerce platforms.
  • Technical Depth: You must have a deep interest in how things work under the hood. You are expected to understand system architecture, API design, and data schemas. You should be able to challenge engineering estimates on the technical approach itself, ensuring we build for scalability rather than just "patching" problems.
  • Talent Magnet: Proven experience in building and scaling elite product teams. You have a reputation for attracting top talent and maintaining a high-performance culture.
  • Multi-Cultural Grit: Demonstrated success in multi-geo environments, with the ability to drive alignment across different work cultures and time zones without losing speed.
  • Change Agent: You have the "grit" to challenge the status quo in a large organization and the leadership skills to bring people along on a transformation journey.


Our Ambition:

We are committed to becoming a technology-first powerhouse that consistently delivers innovative, customer-centric solutions. While we remain rooted in our telecom heritage, our future lies in diversified digital services that keep users engaged, informed, and loyal.

• We are seeking an Agile Product Owner to lead the development and implementation of Consumer Servicing enhancements.   • Perform other duties and/or special projects as assigned

You can become a part of

… a truly aspirational brand, one of India’s fastest growing fintech companies that offers a range of financial services & products for merchants, kirana store owners and end consumers. Valued at over $2.8 Bn within a short span of 3+ years, we focus on empowering small business owners and retailers with business ranging from QR & PoS payments to easy loans to high-yield investment products which in turn enables them to grow and transform. We understand that business and culture are two sides of the same coin. So, alongside business, we are equally focused on building a culture where employees succeed unconditionally.

We believe we are in an ever-evolving space with immense opportunity to build for Bharat! Our people will enable this journey with their ideas, innovations and capabilities. We value diversity, where we encourage different points of view, ways of thinking, new capabilities to strengthen and improve the lives of our customers. And that is not all, we have a lot of fun while we explore new ideas, solve real problems, collaborate, connect - and we do it all together.

Connect with us over social media, coffee or call. We promise to excite you with an opportunity that will “change the game”!


In this role, you have the opportunity to

..Lead the strategy and execution for product line & manage high complexity product line. You will be responsible for setting the vision for our product line, leading a team of product managers, and working closely with other departments to ensure our products not only fulfill customer needs but also drive our business growth.

Responsibilities will include


Functional Expertise

1. Identifies and solves problems at the Org level while influencing product beyond own area of control

2. Drives process improvements at product level, suggests improvements at team/Org level

3. Define, drive, and implement product strategy aligned with the company's overall business objectives

4. Oversee the development and execution of go-to-market strategies


Problem Solving

1. Customer Centric Mindset, able to synthesize wide range of customer inputs (research, data etc.) to identify underlying customer problems

2. Conduct comprehensive market research and competitive analysis to inform product development and strategic positioning

3. Utilize data-driven decision-making to assess product performance and drive improvements based on key metrics.

4. Manage and prioritize product roadmaps, balancing the introduction of new features with the optimization of existing ones


Interaction:

1. Manage focused occasionally complex stakeholder relationships with support from manager; represent activities to senior management with support

2. Awareness and detailed understanding of overall business and industry context

3. Recognized as a mentor for others; may manage team of Product Managers

4. Confirmed ability to work cross functionally to drive the implementation of new features; experience mentoring junior team members


To succeed in the role

Impact

● Define long-term strategy & vision for Product; provides strategic influence across teams and functions


Challenges & Decisions

● Strong analytical applications specifically demonstrating excellent problem solving skills with

complex data


Qualification & Experience (type & industry)

● BE/B.Tech or equivalent Degree. MBA is good to have

● 10-15 Yrs of experience

● Comprehensive knowledge of financial systems, wealthtech products and payment platforms


Skills & know-how

● Should have been hands-on in building & scaling mobile first WealthTech platforms especially in the Stock trading & Mutual Funds verticals.

● Should have owned the building & optimisation of the end to end funnel management for the above products.

● Should also have a detailed understanding of how the Indian Payment ecosystem works, especially the nuances around UPI payments, money flow, recon & settlements, payment error codes etc

● Should have experience in leading & growing a team of experienced Senior Product Managers

● Should have experience directly communicating with, presenting to & influencing CXOs

● High degree of competency with project management including: project planning, issue and

risk identification and management, tracking dependencies and breakthroughs, and communication of overall project status.

● Past success delivering high quality products in a complex and a fast moving environment

items.descriptionHtml:
Position - Senior Director, Product Management

Product: Adobe Illustrator

Business: CPG

Location : Noida

Summary:

This product leader is responsible for defining and implementing the strategic vision and innovative product roadmap for Illustrator, Adobe’s flagship graphic design product and a global leader in creativity. You will champion a culture of innovation, revolutionize the world of design, and set the gold standard for design products to drive Illustrator growth as creative workflows are being fundamentally reshaped by AI and agentic workflows.

The successful candidate will coordinate all facets of Illustrator product and services strategy, roadmap, and integrations across Creative Cloud. You will build high-quality experiences and production services grounded in creative expression, precision, and craft, translating advances in technology into meaningful user value. You will partner closely with engineering, develop, research, and market launch teams to bring these to life with quality and at scale. There will be a strong focus on understanding the market and competitors, identifying new opportunities for customer acquisition, engagement and retention, and using product-led growth and data-driven strategies. You will lead a strong product team to deliver user-centric innovation in products and services at scale.

The Opportunity:

Illustrator is Adobe’s flagship graphic design product and a global leader in creativity, used by millions worldwide. It sets the standard for precision, power, and expressive design.

The opportunity is to build on this foundation to define the next phase of growth with high-value workflows, expanding to new users and use cases, and strengthening Illustrator’s role within connected workflows across Adobe’s ecosystem. Advances in AI accelerate creation and expand creative possibilities, simplify complex tasks, and enable more fluid and expressive ways of working while preserving the control and craft that define the product.

Your role is to shape this evolution, driving category-defining experiences and unlocking new avenues for adoption, engagement, and impact.

What you'll Do:

A suitable candidate will bring a strong track record of defining and delivering high-impact products and experiences across Desktop, Web, and iPad along with a clear point of view on how creative workflows are evolving. You will operate effectively in a cross-organization, geographically distributed environment and lead through influence to drive meaningful impact.

  • Set product vision, strategy, and roadmap, and drive alignment with senior leadership across the organization.
  • Create delightful product experiences that serve high-value user needs.
  • Integrate intelligent assistance and agentic capabilities into key user journeys to meaningfully expand creative possibilities and efficiency
  • Define and drive success and growth through clear metrics, experimentation, and evaluation frameworks, enabling continuous learning and iteration.
  • Partner with engineering, design, research, and product marketing to deliver high-quality, scalable solutions aligned to customer and business value.
  • Build and lead a high-performing team of Product Managers, setting the standard on product thinking, execution, and impact.

What you need to succeed:

  • Proven product management leadership experience, including leading diverse teams of product managers on industry-leading product and platform environments.
  • Strong track record of creating compelling product vision, roadmap and delivering high-impact, delightful, customer-centric products with attention to craft, usability, and performance.
  • Rich experience with AI-infused products, including generative AI, and a deep understanding of their impact on user workflows, quality, and evaluation.
  • Proven ability to drive product growth through metrics, experimentation, and data-informed decision making.
  • Demonstrated ability to partner deeply with engineering, design, marketing, and research to deliver end-to-end experiences.

Adobe is an equal opportunity employer. We hire dedicated individuals, regardless of gender, race, ethnicity, ancestry, age, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, cultural background or religious beliefs. We know that when our employees feel appreciated and included, they can be more creative, innovative and successful. This is what it means to be Adobe For All.

About Adobe

Adobe empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools that unleash creativity, productivity and personalized customer experiences. Adobe’s industry-leading offerings including Adobe Acrobat Studio, Adobe Express, Adobe Firefly, Creative Cloud, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Manager, and GenStudio enable people and businesses to turn ideas into impact, powered by AI and driven by human ingenuity.

Our 30,000+ employees worldwide are creating the future and raising the bar as we drive the next decade of growth. We’re on a mission to hire the very best and believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. At Adobe, we believe that great ideas can come from anywhere in the organization. The next big idea could be yours.

Let’s Adobe together

At Adobe, we believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. Learn more about Adobe life, including our values and culture, focus on people, purpose and community, Adobe for All, comprehensive benefits programs, the stories we tell, the customers we serve, and how you can help us advance our mission of empowering everyone to create.

Adobe is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on gender, race or color, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. Learn more.

Adobe aims to make our Careers website and recruiting process accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call +1 408-536-3015.

AI Use Guidelines for Interviews:

Our interviews are designed to reflect your own skills and thinking. The use of AI or recording tools during live interviews is not permitted unless explicitly invited by the interviewer or approved in advance as part of a reasonable accommodation. If these tools are used inappropriately or in a way that misrepresents your work, your application may not move forward in the process.

At Adobe, we empower employees to innovate with AI — and we look for candidates eager to do the same. As part of the hiring experience, we provide clear guidance on where AI is encouraged during the process and where it’s restricted during live interviews. See how we think about AI in the hiring experience.

items.description: JoVE is the world- leading producer and provider of video solutions with the mission to improve scientific research and education. Millions of scientists, educators and students use JoVE for their research, teaching and learning. Our institutional clients comprise over 1,000 universities, colleges, and biopharma companies, including such leaders as Harvard, MIT, Yale, and Stanford. As a rapidly growing company, with offices in the USA, UK, Australia, and India servicing clients in over 60 countries, we are seeking talented and ambitious individuals to join our company.The Role:As the Senior Director of Product, you will lead JoVE’s product strategy, portfolio roadmap, and execution across our Science Research and Education markets. You will be responsible for shaping the long-term product vision, identifying high-impact growth opportunities, and delivering best-in-class teaching, learning, and research experiences for our users.This role requires a strategic product leader who can balance customer insight, market trends, business goals, and execution excellence. If you are passionate about building impactful digital products, leading high-performing teams, and translating customer needs into scalable product innovation, we would love to speak with you.Responsibilities:Define and lead the overall product strategy, vision, and roadmap for JoVE’s product portfolio.Lead and mentor product managers, fostering a culture of ownership, collaboration, customer obsession, and data-driven decision-making.Identify key customer needs, unmet market opportunities, and growth areas through partnerships with Consumer Insights, UX Research, Sales, Customer Success, and 1st- and 3rd-party research.Own product discovery, prioritization, roadmap planning, and execution across multiple product lines or platforms.Define, track, and communicate product metrics, delivery KPIs, and business performance indicators.Stay current with industry trends, emerging technologies, customer behavior, and competitive dynamics to inform product strategy.Drive innovation by challenging the status quo and influencing cross-functional teams toward impactful product improvements.Present product strategy, roadmap progress, customer insights, and business outcomes to executive leadership and key stakeholders.Ensure strong product management practices, including discovery, experimentation, prioritization, launch planning, adoption tracking, and lifecycle management.Requirements:A Bachelor’s degree 10+ years of experience in software or digital product management. 6+ years of experience leading and developing product management teams.Proven track record of building, launching, and scaling successful products that have driven measurable business growth.Strong experience owning product strategy, portfolio roadmaps, and cross-functional execution in a fast-paced environment.Results-driven with an ability to work in a fast paced environment. Strong analytical skills with experience defining product metrics, KPIs, business cases, and success measures.Excellent communication, storytelling, and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence executive, technical, and non-technical audiences.Customer-obsessed mindset with the ability to translate qualitative and quantitative insights into product direction.Why Join JoVE?A competitive compensation package.You will make a direct impact in accelerating science research and education.Opportunity to work with global teams and in an environment that promotes innovation and collaboration.Our strong promotion from within culture draws a clear path to advance your career with us.
items.descriptionHtml:
JoVE is the world- leading producer and provider of video solutions with the mission to improve scientific research and education. Millions of scientists, educators and students use JoVE for their research, teaching and learning. Our institutional clients comprise over 1,000 universities, colleges, and biopharma companies, including such leaders as Harvard, MIT, Yale, and Stanford. As a rapidly growing company, with offices in the USA, UK, Australia, and India servicing clients in over 60 countries, we are seeking talented and ambitious individuals to join our company.


The Role:

As the Senior Director of Product, you will lead JoVE’s product strategy, portfolio roadmap, and execution across our Science Research and Education markets. You will be responsible for shaping the long-term product vision, identifying high-impact growth opportunities, and delivering best-in-class teaching, learning, and research experiences for our users.

This role requires a strategic product leader who can balance customer insight, market trends, business goals, and execution excellence. If you are passionate about building impactful digital products, leading high-performing teams, and translating customer needs into scalable product innovation, we would love to speak with you.


Responsibilities:

  • Define and lead the overall product strategy, vision, and roadmap for JoVE’s product portfolio.
  • Lead and mentor product managers, fostering a culture of ownership, collaboration, customer obsession, and data-driven decision-making.
  • Identify key customer needs, unmet market opportunities, and growth areas through partnerships with Consumer Insights, UX Research, Sales, Customer Success, and 1st- and 3rd-party research.
  • Own product discovery, prioritization, roadmap planning, and execution across multiple product lines or platforms.
  • Define, track, and communicate product metrics, delivery KPIs, and business performance indicators.
  • Stay current with industry trends, emerging technologies, customer behavior, and competitive dynamics to inform product strategy.
  • Drive innovation by challenging the status quo and influencing cross-functional teams toward impactful product improvements.
  • Present product strategy, roadmap progress, customer insights, and business outcomes to executive leadership and key stakeholders.
  • Ensure strong product management practices, including discovery, experimentation, prioritization, launch planning, adoption tracking, and lifecycle management.


Requirements:

  • A Bachelor’s degree
  • 10+ years of experience in software or digital product management. 6+ years of experience leading and developing product management teams.
  • Proven track record of building, launching, and scaling successful products that have driven measurable business growth.
  • Strong experience owning product strategy, portfolio roadmaps, and cross-functional execution in a fast-paced environment.
  • Results-driven with an ability to work in a fast paced environment.
  • Strong analytical skills with experience defining product metrics, KPIs, business cases, and success measures.
  • Excellent communication, storytelling, and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence executive, technical, and non-technical audiences.
  • Customer-obsessed mindset with the ability to translate qualitative and quantitative insights into product direction.



Why Join JoVE?

  • A competitive compensation package.
  • You will make a direct impact in accelerating science research and education.
  • Opportunity to work with global teams and in an environment that promotes innovation and collaboration.
  • Our strong promotion from within culture draws a clear path to advance your career with us.

items.descriptionHtml:
We are hiring a Product Manager to drive the development of next-generation SaaS and Generative AI products. The role involves owning the end-to-end product lifecycle, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and delivering impactful customer experiences. Experience in SaaS products, workflow optimization, and data-driven decision-making is preferred. Exposure to Agentic AI, LLMs, and Gen AI applications will be a strong advantage.


If you’re passionate about building AI-powered products in a fast-paced environment, we’d love to connect.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Drive end-to-end product lifecycle management – from ideation, feature prioritization, to launch and post-launch analysis – for a suite of B2B SaaS products.
  • Collaborate with engineering, design, marketing, and customer success teams to ensure successful product delivery aligned with business goals and user needs.
  • Lead workflow definition and optimization, ensuring seamless and scalable customer journeys across the product suite.
  • Analyze usage data, product metrics, and customer feedback to drive data-informed decisions and continuous product improvement.
  • Oversee client onboarding, launch, and post-launch experience, prioritizing tasks based on criticality and impact.
  • Monitor client engagement and health metrics to proactively identify and mitigate potential churn risks.
  • Work with cross-functional teams to build and scale Gen AI-powered applications, enhancing automation, personalization, and user engagement.
  • Support internal process improvements and automation initiatives to streamline product operations and accelerate time-to-market.
  • Serve as a voice of the customer internally, advocating for high-impact features that enhance value and usability.
  • Lead and manage a team of Product Managers while driving collaboration across cross-functional teams to ensure successful product execution and delivery.


Qualifications:

  • 5–7 years of post-MBA experience in Product Management or a related field, preferably in SaaS or enterprise technology.
  • MBA from a Tier-1 institute strongly preferred.
  • Demonstrated experience in managing SaaS products and a strong grasp of the software development lifecycle (SDLC).
  • Exposure to building or integrating Generative AI capabilities within software products is a strong advantage.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills with a track record of effective stakeholder and client engagement.
  • Strong analytical and project management skills, prioritization, and multitasking abilities in fast-paced environments.
  • High attention to detail and a strong bias for action and quality.


Good to Have:

  • Experience with Agile methodologies and tools like Jira or Asana.
  • Background in user research or UX/UI collaboration.
  • Knowledge of AI/ML concepts and real-world implementation in products.
  • Experience working on agentic AI products, including autonomous workflows, multi-agent systems, or AI-driven decision-making applications, is highly preferred.
  • Understanding of Large Language Models (LLMs), prompt engineering, and LLM-powered product integrations is preferred.

items.descriptionHtml:
Job Description

We are seeking an enthusiastic and detail-oriented Product Owner to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru, India. As a Product Owner, you will play a pivotal role in bridging the gap between our product vision and development execution.

The Product Owner will lead the development of fraud detection and prevention products within a FinTech environment. This role focuses on maximizing product value by defining and prioritizing features that reduce financial crime, improve customer trust, and meet regulatory requirements. You will work closely with engineering, data science, risk, and compliance teams to deliver scalable, real-time fraud solutions.

This is an excellent opportunity for a visionary professional who thrives in an agile environment and is passionate about building products that make a real impact.

  • Partner with Product Managers to develop, maintain, and communicate a clear and compelling product roadmap aligned with strategic business objectives
  • Create and prioritize a healthy, well-organized product backlog, ensuring all features and user stories are clearly defined with acceptance criteria
  • Write comprehensive user stories and conduct detailed requirements analysis to translate complex business needs into actionable development tasks
  • Define sprint goals and collaborate with development teams during planning activities to ensure clarity and alignment on deliverables
  • Conduct user journey mapping and usability testing to understand customer needs and validate product decisions with data-driven insights
  • Formally accept completed work and ensure it meets quality standards and acceptance criteria before release
  • Manage cross-team dependencies and communicate build progress, forecasted delivery timelines, and product performance to stakeholders
  • Support product discovery activities through elaboration of features from the roadmap, conducting ROI analysis to determine approval for build
  • Ensure Non-Functional Requirements are created, maintained, and tested against throughout the product lifecycle
  • Actively participate in agile ceremonies and scaled agile events, promoting agile values and driving continuous improvement through inspect and adapt cycles
  • Leverage business systems knowledge, industry requirements, and practical implications to support informed product priorities
  • Analyze product performance metrics and KPIs to recommend data-driven solutions and approaches to the Product Manager

  • Own the product vision and roadmap for fraud detection and prevention capabilities

  • Translate business, risk, and regulatory requirements into clear user stories and acceptance criteria

  • Manage and prioritize the product backlog based on fraud risk, customer impact, and ROI

  • Collaborate with data science teams on fraud models, rules engines, and machine-learning initiatives

  • Work closely with engineering teams to deliver real-time and batch fraud solutions

    Partner with Risk, Compliance, AML, and Operations teams to ensure regulatory alignment

  • Define and monitor KPIs such as fraud loss reduction, false positives, approval rates, and customer friction

  • Support model lifecycle management (feature changes, monitoring, retraining, explainability)

  • Ensure solutions comply with regulatory and data privacy requirements (e.g., PSD2, GDPR, PCI DSS)





Qualifications

Education:


  • Bachelor's degree in any discipline, preferably in Business, Information Technology, or related field

Required Experience:


  • Proven experience in a Product Owner or similar product management role
  • Demonstrated experience working within a software or product development organization
  • Proven track record of successfully interfacing and collaborating with cross-functional teams including development, design, and business stakeholders
  • Experience working in an agile or scaled agile environment

Essential Skills & Knowledge:


  • Proficiency in writing clear, concise user stories with well-defined acceptance criteria
  • Expert-level backlog prioritization and management skills
  • Solid understanding of user journey mapping and process mapping techniques
  • Experience conducting or interpreting usability testing and user feedback
  • Comprehensive knowledge of agile ways of working, agile metrics, and sprint execution
  • Strong understanding of compliance, governance stewardship, and regulatory requirements
  • Ability to define and track success metrics and OKRs
  • Proficiency with work management tools such as JIRA, Azure DevOps (ADO), or similar platforms
  • Hands-on experience with collaboration tools such as Miro or equivalent
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities with a data-driven mindset
  • Demonstrated stakeholder management and relationship-building capabilities

  • Proven experience as a Product Owner or Product Manager in FinTech or financial services

  • Hands-on experience with fraud detection and prevention systems

  • Strong understanding of card, payment, or digital fraud (e.g., transaction fraud, account takeover, identity fraud)

  • Experience working with data-driven products and analytics platforms

  • Solid knowledge of Agile/Scrum frameworks

  • Ability to work with technical and non-technical stakeholders

  • Strong prioritization and decision-making skills in high-risk environments

Preferred Skills & Knowledge:


  • Experience with user research methodologies and user behavior analysis
  • Knowledge of user feedback analysis and incorporation into product decisions
  • Understanding of product strategy and strategic planning
  • Familiarity with agile metrics tools and dashboards
  • Experience in financial services or fintech organizations
  • Certification in product management or agile methodologies (Scrum, SAFe, etc.)

Behavioral Attributes:


  • Demonstrates exceptional organizational and time management skills
  • Shows strong attention to detail and commitment to quality
  • Exhibits collaborative and inclusive approach to working with diverse teams
  • Displays innovative thinking and openness to new ideas and approaches
  • Maintains transparency and integrity in all communications and decision-making
  • Demonstrates resilience and flexibility in dynamic, fast-paced environments
  • Shows genuine customer focus and empathy for end-user needs
  • Exhibits goal-oriented mindset with strong drive to deliver results
  • Maintains a positive, enthusiastic attitude even in challenging circumstances
  • Demonstrates decisiveness and ability to make informed decisions under uncertainty
  • Shows willingness to accept feedback constructively and adapt accordingly
  • Actively supports and celebrates the success of team members

Additional Information

At Endava, we’re committed to creating an open, inclusive, and respectful environment where everyone feels safe, valued, and empowered to be their best. We welcome applications from people of all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives—because we know that inclusive teams help us deliver smarter, more innovative solutions for our customers. Hiring decisions are based on merit, skills, qualifications, and potential. If you need adjustments or support during the recruitment process, please let us know.

items.descriptionHtml:
JOB DESCRIPTION

Jubilant Bhartia Group

Jubilant Bhartia Group is a global conglomerate founded by Mr. Shyam S Bhartia and Mr. Hari S Bhartia with strong presence in diverse sectors like Pharmaceuticals, Contract Research and Development Services, Proprietary Novel Drugs, Life Science Ingredients, Agri Products, Performance Polymers, Food Service (QSR), Food, Auto, Consulting in Aerospace and Oilfield Services. Jubilant Bhartia Group has four flagships Companies- Jubilant Pharmova Limited, Jubilant Ingrevia Limited, Jubilant FoodWorks Limited and Jubilant Industries Limited. Currently the group has a global workforce of around 43,000 employees.


About Jubilant Ingrevia Limited

Jubilant Ingrevia is now a member of the elite Global Lighthouse Network (GLN) of the World Economic Forum (WEF)

Celebrating our Culture and People.

We are proud to be a Great Place to Work certified!

Jubilant Ingrevia history goes back to 1978 with the incorporation of VAM Organics Limited, which later became Jubilant Organosys and then Jubilant Life Sciences and now demerged to an independent entity as Jubilant Ingrevia Limited, which is listed in both the stock exchanges of India. Over the years, company has developed global capacities and leadership in chosen business segments.

Ingrevia is born out of a union of ‘Ingredients’ and ‘Life’ (‘Vie’ in French). Jubilant Ingrevia Limited is committed to offering high-quality and innovative life science ingredients to enrich all forms of life.

Jubilant Ingrevia, a global integrated Life Science products and Innovative Solutions provider serving, Pharmaceutical, Nutrition, Agrochemical, Consumer and Industrial customers with our customised products and solutions that are innovative, cost-effective and conforming to excellent quality standards.

Jubilant Ingrevia Limited offers a broad portfolio of high-quality ingredients that find application in a wide range of industries. Jubilant Ingrevia’s portfolio also extends to custom development and manufacturing for pharmaceutical and agrochemical customers on an exclusive basis.

Our business is split across 3 business verticals, with global leadership across our key product lines.



Speciality Chemicals: The Specialty Chemical business of Jubilant Ingrevia manufactures Pyridine, Picolines and its forward integration derivatives, which finds application in agrochemicals, pharmaceuticals, dyes, solvents, metal finishes, fine chemicals, semiconductors etc.

We have also launched new platform of Diketene & its value-added derivatives for multiple industry use. We are an established ‘partner of choice’ in CDMO, with more investment plans in GMP & Non-GMP multi-product facilities for Pharma, Agro and Semi-conductor customers.

Chemical Intermediates: The Chemical Intermediates business has acetic anhydride and value added anhydrides and aldehydes catering to various industries.

Nutrition & Health Solutions: The Nutrition & Heath Solutions business unit offers B3 & Picolinates (Chromium & Zinc) which are fully backward integrated. Our ingredients find application in animal nutrition, human nutrition, personal care, etc. We provide high-quality feed & food additives having application in poultry, dairy, aqua & pet food industry. In Human Nutrition & Health Solutions, we offer food ingredients & premix solutions to nutrition.

Jubilant Ingrevia Limited is supported by five state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities in India. We practice world-class manufacturing processes in our day-to-day operations, assuring our customers with unmatched quality and timely delivery of products through innovations and cutting-edge technology. Transforming Manufacturing for Operational Excellence & Sustainability with “zero tolerance to any non-compliance” is the core focus of Jubilant Ingrevia Manufacturing.

We have 5 world-class manufacturing facilities i.e. One in UP at Gajraula, Two in Gujarat at Bharuch and Savli, Two in Maharashtra at Nira and Ambernath.

Environment Sustainability

The company is committed to environmental sustainability and supports green chemistry by prioritising the use of bio inputs in manufacturing. Jubilant is one of the world’s largest producers of Acetaldehyde from the bio route.

Find out more about us at www.jubilantingrevia.com

The Position: Product Manager (B2B | NHI)

Organization: Jubilant Ingrevia Limited

Designation & Level: Associate Director - Product Manager – NHI (B2B)

Location: Corporate Office

Reporting to: SBU Head – NHI




Role Purpose

The Product Manager – NHI (B2B) will drive strategic product leadership and innovation for the Nutrition & Health Ingredients portfolio by building a multi-year product roadmap, leading customer and application-led product development, enabling commercial success, and managing portfolio profitability through cross-functional execution and supplier partnerships.

Key Responsibilities

1) Strategic Product Leadership & Roadmap

  • Develop and execute a multi-year B2B product roadmap aligned with customer needs, market trends, and business growth priorities.
  • Identify national and global trends in nutrition ingredients, health claims, and application formats to build differentiated offerings.
  • Map market gaps and white spaces across industries such as functional foods, beverages, dietary supplements, and nutrition solutions.

2) Support to Ongoing Product Range

  • Support current NHI product portfolio to ensure sustained growth and customer satisfaction.
  • Partner with Sales and Technical/Application teams to support customer queries, trials, reformulations, and troubleshooting for ongoing products.
  • Lead continuous improvement initiatives for existing products through cost optimization, performance enhancement, and process improvements.

3) Product Innovation, Development & Commercialization

  • Lead end-to-end product development from concept → feasibility → sampling → scale-up → commercialization.
  • Translate customer requirements into clear technical product specifications for R&D, applications, and manufacturing teams.
  • Drive innovation through new ingredient technologies, improved functionality, and differentiated formats suitable for B2B customers.
  • Support creation of product documentation including spec sheets, technical dossiers, stability data, and application guidance.

4) Customer & Market Insights (B2B Focus)

  • Capture insights through customer interactions, industry forums, and competitive benchmarking.
  • Convert insights into new product concepts

5) Cross-Functional Execution & Stakeholder Alignment

  • Work closely with Sales, Supply Chain, Finance, R&D, Quality, Regulatory, and Operations to ensure smooth execution of product plans.
  • Lead governance forums to ensure alignment on timelines, cost targets, specifications, and launch readiness.

6) Portfolio & Profitability Management

  • Own portfolio performance across multi-year horizon including margins, cost optimization, and product lifecycle management.
  • Support segmentation and positioning based on customer industry, application needs, value proposition, and competitive differentiation.
  • Partner with Sales and Finance to develop business cases, pricing logic, and value-based positioning for key offerings.

Qualifications & Experience

  • B.Tech in Chemical Engineering / Technology and MBA from top B school
  • 6–10 years of experience in product development, preferably in B2B Nutrition / Ingredients.
  • Proven experience taking products from concept to commercial launch in a manufacturing-led environment.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with hands-on experience in scientific methods, experimental design, and structured innovation.

Personal Characteristics

Product Director, Last Mile (LM) business:

Delhivery is India’s leading digital commerce enablement company, where we use technology to

drive supply chain innovation. Our mission is to fulfil all of India’s online and offline consumption demand through best-in-class industry solutions, domain expertise and pan-India operations.

As a Director, you will work closely with stakeholders (Shippers, Consignees, Business Development, Operations, Finance, Customer Experience, Design) and co-define & execute the near-term product roadmap for the business in line with the business strategy and product vision. The aim is to build industry-first product solutions for the clients to optimize logistics costs for the shippers, exceed service levels and enhance customer experience.


The successful candidate will:

  • 10+ years of product management experience, with at least 4 years in a senior role focused on last mile delivery, logistics, or supply chain platforms at scale.
  • Familiarity with next-generation AI development tools (e.g., Kiro or equivalent) that enable spec-to-code workflows, enabling the team to meaningfully engage with engineering teams building AI-native logistics features
  • Good understanding of last mile operations including forward and reverse logistics workflows and serviceability, ideally from direct exposure to Indian logistics or e-commerce ecosystems
  • Experience working cross-functionally with operations, engineering, data science, and commercial teams to translate ground-level delivery challenges into scalable product solutions


Requirements:

  • Strong leadership track record of mentoring, and scaling product teams while maintaining sharp focus on business outcomes
  • Mandatory hands-on understanding of AI-based product development, including experience conceptualizing and delivering agentic AI solutions at scale
  • Ability to influence and align diverse stakeholders across business, operations, engineering, and leadership, translating complex product capabilities into a clear, future-ready vision and tangible outcomes
  • Deep empathy for customers and delivery executives, with experience designing AI/mobile native experiences

WDTS India is Software R&D unit of Walker Digital Table Systems Inc (WDTS) with its head office and innovation leadership in Las Vegas, sales and support office in Macau, and Hardware is developed, designed and manufactured in Australia. We are an equal opportunity employer.


Website: https://www.wdtablesystems.com


Senior Product Owner


Role Overview

We are seeking a Senior Product Owner to lead the strategy, execution, and lifecycle management of software products within our gaming technology portfolio. This role is ideal for a self-motivated, detail-oriented, and outcome-driven product professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment and can translate business needs into high-quality, scalable solutions.


The Senior Product Owner will work closely with engineering, data, design, QA, and senior business stakeholders to make informed product decisions and execute product strategies that support the company’s long-term growth and sustainability. The role requires the ability to manage multiple priorities, learn quickly, and collaborate effectively across teams.


Key Responsibilities


Product Strategy & Ownership

• Define and execute product roadmaps and backlogs aligned with business objectives, customer needs, and market insights.

• Specify market and customer requirements through close interaction with customers, field service teams, and internal stakeholders.

• Document product challenges, opportunities, and success criteria to guide development and decision-making.


Execution & Delivery

• Drive new feature development from start to finish by:


o Writing clear product requirements, specifications, user stories, and acceptance criteria.

o Defining delivery timelines and priorities in partnership with engineering and QA teams.

o Working cross-functionally with engineering, data, design, and QA in an Agile environment.

o Experience in JIRA and in designing/wireframing tools such as Balsamiq and Figma.


• Leverage AI-assisted tools to improve efficiency and quality in day-to-day product management activities, including:


o Drafting, refining, and validating product requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria.

o Synthesizing customer feedback, support tickets, and field insights into actionable product inputs.


• Support AI-enabled efficiencies across the delivery lifecycle, including:


o Backlog refinement and sprint planning.

o Test case creation and defect triage.

o Product documentation, release notes, and training materials.


• Ensure all product and project requirements, objectives, and dependencies are clearly documented and communicated.

• Perform and support user acceptance testing (UAT), identifying defects, enhancements, and opportunities for continuous improvement.

• Plan and manage product roadmaps and releases using Agile/Scrum or Kanban methodologies.


Stakeholder Collaboration & Communication

• Collaborate closely with senior stakeholders to align on product vision, priorities, and delivery trade-offs.

• Develop and deliver clear, concise presentations and updates for internal and external audiences.

• Work closely with UX designers to ensure products deliver an intuitive, seamless, and high-quality user experience.


Documentation & Enablement

• Assist with the development and distribution of product documentation, including:


o Product requirements and specifications

o Release notes

o Regulatory documentation requests

o Training and enablement materials


Required Qualifications

• Degree or certification in Business, Information Systems, Computer Science, or a related field.

• Proven experience in product management.

• Demonstrated success in defining, launching, and maintaining software products in a cross-functional environment.

• Exposure to Agile methodologies (Scrum/Kanban); familiarity with Waterfall is a plus.

• Domain experience or familiarity with the casino or gaming industry is preferred but not required.


Preferred Skills & Experience

• Practical experience using AI-assisted tools to improve productivity, documentation quality, and decision-making.

• Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret data and translate insights into clear product actions.

• Experience working closely with engineering and technical teams on complex software systems.


Key Competencies

• Strong written and verbal communication skills with fluency in English.

• Ability to work under pressure, manage ambiguity, and quickly shift priorities while meeting deadlines.

• Excellent organizational skills, attention to detail, and ability to manage multiple initiatives simultaneously.

• A self-starter and collaborative team player who thrives in a fast-paced environment.

• Strong stakeholder management skills, with the ability to present information succinctly and accurately to senior decision-makers.

items.descriptionHtml:
Who we are…?


About REA India Pte. Ltd.:

REA India is a subsidiary of REA Group Ltd. (ASX: REA), a leading digital real estate business headquartered in Melbourne, Australia, and part of the NewsCorp family.


REA India owns Housing.com, the country’s leading real estate technology platform. With a vision to change the way India experiences property, the platform helps consumers throughout their buying, renting, and selling journey. It also offers a robust suite of Self services—such as smart listing tools, digital assistance—empowering home seekers and owners to manage their property needs with ease and online rent payment. These offerings enhance convenience, improve listing visibility, and enable direct engagement for both property owners and seekers.

For businesses, Housing.com offers advertising and listing products for developers and agents, as well as exclusive sales and marketing solutions. It also offers Housing Studio, a suite of innovative AR&VR content to drive better engagement.


REA India operates with a team of 1100+ professionals across 30+ offices nationwide, with its corporate headquarters in Gurugram, Haryana.



Our Culture

Culture forms the core of our foundation and our effort towards creating an engaging workplace that has resulted in REA India being ranked 5th among the coveted list of India’s Best 100 Companies to Work For in 2024 by the Great Place to Work Institute®. REA India was also ranked among Top 5 workplaces list in 2023, the Top 25 workplaces list in 2022 and 2021, and the Top 50 workplaces list in 2019. In addition, REA India was also recognized as Best Workplace™ in Building a Culture of Innovation by All in 2025, 2024 & 2023 and India’s Best Workplaces™ in Retail (e-commerce category) for the fifth time in 2025.


REA India once again made it to the Top 15 Best Workplaces in Asia for 2024, marking its second consecutive appearance, after ranking 4th in 2023, 55th in 2022, and 48th in 2021. Additionally, REA India has been recognized twice in a row among the Top 50 Best Workplaces™ for Women in India (2024, 2023, and 2021) and earned a spot among India’s Top 10 Best Workplaces for Millennials List for the second consecutive year by Great Place to Work®.


At REA India, we believe in creating a home for our people, where they feel a sense of belonging and purpose. By fostering a culture of inclusion and continuous learning and growth, every team member has the opportunity to thrive, embrace the spirit of being part of a global family, while contributing to revolutionize the way India experiences property. When you come to REA India, you truly COME HOME!


REA India (Housing.com) is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes all qualified individuals to apply for employment. We are committed to creating an environment that is free from discrimination, harassment, and any other form of unlawful behavior. We value diversity and inclusion and do not discriminate against our people or applicants for employment based on age, color, gender, marital status, caste, religion, race, ethnic group, nationality, religious or political conviction, sexual orientation, gender identity, pregnancy, family responsibility, or disability or any other legally protected status. We firmly strive to eliminate any barriers that may impede equal opportunities while also recognizing that specific job roles may require appointees to possess the necessary qualifications, skills, abilities to perform essential functions of the position effectively.



About the role

As the Associate Director of Product – CAIP (Content, AI and Platform), you will own the product vision and strategy across three of REA India’s most critical charters: Content, Artificial Intelligence, and our emerging Platform capabilities.


You will lead teams to reshape the user experience by building intelligence into our products, leveraging cutting-edge technologies such as GenAI, Agentic AI , strengthening content ecosystems that drive trust and discovery, and building platform foundations that enable REA India to scale exponentially.


This is a senior leadership role that requires strategic breadth, technical depth, and the ability to align diverse teams around a unified product vision, further strengthening REA India’s position as India’s leading real estate technology platform. The role reports to the Chief Product Officer and is a member of the Product & Design Leadership Team.



What does this role hold for you…?


Content Product Strategy

  • Define and drive the content product roadmap, ensuring REA India delivers high-quality, trustworthy, and data-enriched property content across Housing.com
  • Build innovative, flexible and scalable solutions leveraging GenAI and Agentic capabilities
  • Lead strategies for content creation, curation, and enrichment at scale — spanning locality data, property listings, imagery, and market insights
  • Partner with editorial, data, and engineering teams to build content systems that enhance SEO performance, strengthen consumer trust, and enable better decision-making
  • Establish quality frameworks and governance standards to ensure content consistency and accuracy across all platforms and consumer touchpoints


AI Product Strategy and Development

  • Develop and articulate a comprehensive AI product vision and roadmap aligned with REA India’s business objectives and technological priorities
  • Lead cross-functional teams to design, implement, and optimize AI driven solutions innovations targeted at improving our market facing experience and operational efficiency across all REA India platforms


Platform Product Strategy

  • Own the platform product strategy, defining foundational capabilities — APIs, data pipelines, developer tools, and shared services — that enable rapid and reliable product development across REA India
  • Drive a platform-as-a-product mindset, by partnering closely with engineering and architecture teams to prioritise platform investments that unlock maximum leverage for market-facing teams
  • Build alignment on platform governance, access models, and adoption standards across product and engineering teams
  • Cross-Domain Leadership and Stakeholder Engagement
  • Articulate and communicate REA India’s CAIP strategy,bringing clarity and vision across industry forums, conferences, seminars, and executive panels
  • Collaborate with senior leadership to influence strategic design and execution on content, Ai, and platform initiatives, ensuring alignment with market trends and competitive dynamics
  • Foster partnerships with external technologists, data providers, and thought leaders to continuously refine and strengthen product strategy across all three domains
  • Lead, mentor, and grow high-performing product teams across Content, Ai and Platform , fostering a culture of rigour, curiosity and impact



Apply if you have…

  • 8+ years of experience in product management, with at least 4 years in senior leadership roles within technology-driven organizations
  • Demonstrated experience leading product strategy across multiple domains — ideally spanning content systems, AI /ML products, and platform or infrastructure-led products
  • A proven track record in strategising, launching, and scaling enterprise-level AI initiatives that drive business impact, growth and transform user experiences
  • Deep expertise in AI technologies and machine learning models, including neural networks, natural language processing, and predictive analytics
  • Strong understanding of content management, data quality, and content enrichment strategies in a consumer internet context
  • Experience owning or contributing to platform strategy, API products, or shared capability development
  • Proficiency in leading complex, cross-functional projects in agile environments with a collaborative and outcome-driven approach



Desired Attributes:

  • Strong strategic and analytical thinking , with the ability to synthesise across content, AI and platform to deliver a clear and compelling product vision
  • Exceptional leadership and mentorship skills to inspire and build high-performing, multi-disciplinary teams
  • Ability to operate seamlessly across strategic and execution levels — equally comfortable defining a three-year vision and diving into product and delivery detail when required
  • Passionate for continuous learning and staying ahead of emerging trend in AI technologies, content innovation, and platform engineering
  • Outstanding communication skills with the ability to articulate complex, multi-domain product strategies effectively to diverse stakeholders, including technical teams, executive leadership, and external partners



Know more about us…

Visit our career website at https://careers.housing.com/ and LinkedIn page to know more about our company culture, and gain insights into what makes us a Great Place to Work.

Want to dive into what we do? Visit our main website for an in-depth look at www.housing.com

items.descriptionHtml:
About Us

HighLevel is an AI-powered business operating system that gives agencies, entrepreneurs and SMBs the infrastructure to build, automate and scale. Today, HighLevel supports SMBs across 150+ countries, fueling community-driven growth rooted in real customer outcomes.

To date, businesses operating on HighLevel have generated over $7 billion in ecosystem value, demonstrating the impact of shared infrastructure at scale. By centralizing conversations, automation and intelligence into one system, we help businesses move faster, reduce complexity and execute efficiently.

Behind the platform, HighLevel powers more than 4 billion API hits and 2.5 billion message events daily. With 250 terabytes of distributed data, 250+ microservices and over 1 million domain names supported, our architecture is built for performance, resilience and long-term scalability.

Our people

With over 2,000 team members across 10+ countries, HighLevel operates as a global, remote-first organization built for speed and ownership. We value initiative, clarity and execution, creating space for ambitious people to build systems that support millions of businesses worldwide. Here, innovation thrives, ideas are celebrated and people come first, no matter where they call home.

Our impact

Every month, HighLevel enables more than 1.5 billion messages, 200 million leads and 20 million conversations for the more than 1 million businesses we support. Behind those numbers are real people building independence, expanding opportunity and creating measurable impact. We’re proud to be a part of that.

Learn more about us on our YouTube Channel or Blog Posts

Why This Role Exists

The Sr. Director, Product Management (Platform & Core Products) will lead the foundational layer of HighLevel's product stack, spanning infrastructure platforms, automation capabilities, CRM primitives, and shared systems like identity, permissions, notifications, and audit logging.

This is a critical org-wide leadership role, owning HighLevel’s platform extensibility, data model reliability, cross-surface consistency, and internal product development velocity. You will manage a team of 25–30 PMs via 3 Group Product Managers and drive strategy, execution, and org design for a portfolio that underpins everything from marketing automation and conversation management to AI-driven workflows and CRM object modeling.

You’ll be expected to scale a high-performance product org, influence product direction across pods, and partner closely with engineering to deliver a scalable, secure, and elegant platform for millions of users.

Strategic Priorities

  • Build an Extensible Platform: Architect reusable primitives (identity, roles, objects, notifications, reporting) that enable faster development across HighLevel.
  • Modernize Core CRM: Scale performance and usability across contacts, companies, tasks, opportunities, and conversations — the backbone of daily SMB workflows.
  • Unlock Scalable Automation: Advance our workflows engine and Workflow AI to power increasingly complex use cases with speed and simplicity.
  • Drive UX Consistency Across Surfaces: Ensure UI, interaction patterns, and product language are coherent across contact, sub-account, and agency layers.
  • Support Data-Driven Product Maturity: Enforce strong instrumentation, analytics readiness, and reporting across all core products.
  • Operationalize Product Management Excellence: Raise the bar for product planning, prioritization, execution, and accountability across 30+ PMs and APMs.

Key Responsibilities

  • Define and drive the long term product vision, roadmap, and success metrics for platform and core product areas.
  • Manage and coach a team ofGroup PMs and PMs,.cultivating a strong leadership bench and ensuring high performance.
  • Serve as the bridge between platform engineering, infra, and product — enabling other teams to move faster through well-designed interfaces and reusable systems.
  • Set quality standards for API design, system performance, scalability, and reliability.
  • Lead cross-functional coordination with design, engineering, QA, support, data, and legal to deliver on-time, high-quality launches.
  • Represent the needs of agencies, sub-accounts, and end contacts in platform and CRM decisions — ensuring we build with deep user empathy.
  • Collaborate with the Product leadership to influence org-wide product strategy, culture, and planning cadences.
  • Lead strategic quarterly and annual planning for the org — bringing clarity to priorities across technical debt, product innovation, and user experience.
  • Act as a thought partner to engineering leadership in shaping architecture and development investment decisions.

What Success Looks Like

  • HighLevel’s platform teams are recognised as enablers, not blockers — other pods build faster using your team's APIs, patterns, and systems.
  • CRM primitives and workflows become more reliable, performant, and deeply adopted by our users — visible in activation and retention metrics.
  • The organization experiences clean product ownership, predictable roadmaps, and fast decision-making under your leadership.
  • Workflow AI and Workflow Core support a growing number of use cases without sacrificing speed, reliability, or clarity.
  • The data model becomes flexible and extensible, enabling custom objects, relationships, and analytics without friction.
  • You are viewed as a strategic thought partners and executional anchor for platform and core products at HighLevel

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • 12–15+ years in product management, with at least 5+ years managing managers (GPMs,Directors or equivalents).
  • Experience scaling platform and core product orgs in fast-growth B2B SaaS companies, (ideally between $500M-$1B ARR).
  • Deep fluency in CRM, automation platforms, or workflow engines — understands data models, APIs, and system-level product thinking.
  • Prior experience building internal platforms or developer tools that support multiple product teams.
  • Ability to scale orgs, implement processes, and hire/coach high-performing PMs.
  • Technical fluency — capable of earning trust with engineering leads and making calls on infra trade-offs, architecture, and scalability.
  • Familiar with two-tier SaaS, multi-tenant environments, and role-based access control models.
  • Strong written and asynchronous communication skills — capable of driving clarity across functions and time zones.

Bonus Points For

  • Experience working on workflow builders, CRM platforms, or marketing automation tools.
  • Background in B2B2SMB or agency-led SaaS models.
  • Exposure to design systems, shared component libraries, or analytics platforms.
  • Hands-on familiarity with platform performance metrics (e.g., P95 latency, Sentry, Grafana).
  • Experience integrating with third-party platforms like Stripe, Meta, Google, or TikTok (even if not leading monetization).

Equal Employment Opportunity Information

The company is an Equal Opportunity Employer. As an employer subject to affirmative action regulations, we invite you to voluntarily provide the following demographic information. This information is used solely for compliance with government recordkeeping, reporting, and other legal requirements. Providing this information is voluntary and refusal to do so will not affect your application status. This data will be kept separate from your application and will not be used in the hiring decision.

We encourage you to review our Privacy Policy before submitting your application

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Description

Job Title : Director of Product

Reporting To : CTO

Role Overview

We are looking for an experienced and strategic Director of Product to lead our B2C product function. This role requires strong ownership of product roadmap, product planning, and execution while managing cross-functional teams including Product Managers (PMs), Associate Product Managers (APMs), and Data teams.

The ideal candidate will drive product vision, ensure alignment with business goals, and deliver high-impact customer-centric solutions.

Key Responsibilities

  • Define and drive the overall product vision, strategy, and roadmap aligned with company objectives
  • Lead product planning and execution across the full product lifecycle
  • Own and prioritize the product roadmap based on customer needs, business impact, and market trends
  • Manage and mentor a team of PMs, APMs, and Data professionals, fostering a high-performance culture
  • Collaborate closely with engineering, design, marketing, and business teams to deliver scalable B2C products
  • Leverage data and analytics to drive product decisions and performance optimization
  • Establish and track key product metrics, ensuring continuous improvement
  • Drive customer-centric thinking and enhance user experience across all touchpoints
  • Identify market opportunities, conduct competitive analysis, and translate insights into actionable product initiatives
  • Ensure timely and high-quality product releases

Key Requirements

  • 10 to 14+ years of experience in Product Management, with significant exposure to B2C products
  • Proven experience in product roadmap planning and execution
  • Strong experience managing teams including PMs, APMs, and Data/Analytics teams
  • Demonstrated ability to scale products and lead cross-functional teams
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a data-driven mindset
  • Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills
  • Experience working in fast-paced startup or mid-sized environments is preferred
  • Bachelors degree in Engineering, Business, or a related field (MBA preferred)

items.descriptionHtml:
Company Overview:


Naviga is the leading provider of software and services powering media-rich industries. Our Content Engagement Platform (CEP) helps companies create, enrich, deliver, and monetize content to manage engagements from end to end. Our solutions are easy to use, scalable and agile. Combining our experience in media with dedication to digital, we've developed software solutions that help any content-driven business meet the demands of the future of information.

With headquarters in Minnetonka, MN, and regional offices throughout the world, Naviga is a trusted partner serving over 3,200 news media, broadcast, magazine, financial services, and corporate clients in 45 countries.


Position Overview:


We are seeking a Product Owner who operates at the intersection of business, technology, and innovation. The ideal candidate combines a strong understanding of Agile delivery with a passion for AI-driven product enablement. This role involves defining the product vision, managing the backlog, and collaborating across cross-functional teams to deliver intelligent, user-focused, and scalable digital solutions. Experience in Media platforms, Digital subscription workflow, Circulation system is highly preferred.


Essential Functions & Responsibilities:


• Define and communicate product vision, strategy, and roadmap aligned with business goals.

• Partner with data science and engineering teams to embed AI/ML capabilities within products.

• Evaluate AI use cases, define success metrics, and ensure ethical, impactful AI adoption.

• Own and prioritize the product backlog based on business value and feasibility.

• Write epics, user stories, and acceptance criteria to guide delivery.

• Collaborate with stakeholders using Confluence and Microsoft Teams for transparent communication.

• Analyze product performance, feature adoption, and customer feedback for continuous improvement.

• Champion Agile principles, experimentation, and iterative delivery.


Education, Experience, and Requirements


• Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Engineering, or related field.

• 5+ years of experience as a Product Owner or Product Manager in a digital or technology-driven environment.

• Proven experience in Agile delivery (Scrum/Kanban) and backlog management.

• Strong understanding of AI/ML applications, automation, and data-driven product design.

• Experience with Jira and Confluence for backlog and documentation management.

• Excellent communication, prioritization, and stakeholder management skills.

• Familiarity with Microsoft Teams for coordination and collaboration.

• Certifications such as CSPO, PSPO, or PMI-ACP are preferred.

• Experience in Media platforms, Digital subscription workflow, Circulation system is a strong plus.

• Exposure to AI product delivery, prompt engineering, or AI solution scoping is mandatory .


DESIRED BEHAVIORS*


  • Technically proficient – knows role and has a solid familiarity with tasks and responsibilities.
  • A bias to action – a willingness to “jump right in” with an emphasis on producing results.
  • Highly collaborative – an affinity for solving complex problems through dialog with team members.
  • Curiosity – always seeking the “why’s” and “how’s” in the interest of continuous learning and the mastery of a craft.
  • Innovation – the courage to challenge prevailing assumptions and suggest better ways of doing things to achieve business value.
  • Comfortable with ambiguity – can begin to explore and solve complex problems even when the problem and solution are not always well defined.
  • Display ethical character and competence - acts with integrity and intent, is accountable for own actions, behaves per the values. Act as a good citizen of Naviga

Responsibilities, tasks, and duties of the jobholder might differ from those outlined in the job description and other duties, as assigned, might be required.

items.descriptionHtml:
At Aristocrat, we focus on bringing happiness to life through the excitement of play. As a global frontrunner in gaming content and technology, we seek to develop outstanding experiences for our players and customers. Our mission is to provide world-class outcomes across our diverse business sectors, which include regulated land-based gaming, social casino, and online real-money gaming. Being part of our innovative and dynamic team, you will have the opportunity to make a strong contribution and support our ambitious objectives. We emphasize collaboration, inclusivity, and imagination, making this a fantastic and stimulating place to work.

We seek an experienced Technical Product Owner to join our engineering team. This role involves driving Agile development forward, ensuring efficient software rollouts, and steering technical teams to accomplish their goals. You will have the opportunity to work with innovative technology and collaborate across various business functions to deliver quality products.

What You'll Do
  • Enable the release of value by ensuring frequent software deployments of high quality.
  • Apply Agile development and software engineering principles.
  • Define, own, and communicate the capture of delivery benchmarks.
  • Drive continuous improvement within your teams and department.
  • Plan, track, and communicate delivery achievements.
  • Own and adjust staffing strategy to deliver business needs.
  • Lead recruitment activity.
  • Promote collaboration with other business areas and teams, such as UX, Build, Product, Tech, Data, Network Operations, and Production Engineering.
  • Cultivate a learning environment.
  • Facilitate career progression.
  • Undertake and ensure regular line management activities for direct and indirect reports.
  • Support the flow of communications to and from the team.
  • Actively promote an inclusive working environment.
  • Track and validate costs.
  • Support and align with Target Architecture.

What We're Looking For
  • Solid knowledge of Agile/Scrum methodology along with software engineering practices and tools.
  • Theoretical knowledge or practical experience with Agile at scale.
  • Experience working within DevOps organizations implementing practices such as continuous delivery, monitoring, and testing through automation.
  • Proficient understanding of XP operational methodologies such as writing tests before coding, Continuous Integration, and collaborative programming.
  • Excellent leadership, organization, communication, and interpersonal skills.
  • Proven application of planning and estimation techniques including capacity and scenario planning.
  • Capacity planning – aligning team’s capacity based on sprint work and member availability.
  • Data-driven monitoring and measures – tracking benchmarks, product metrics, and measures of success.
  • Presentation and storytelling – conducting engaging and captivating meetings and presenting ideas/findings.
  • Cross-functional collaboration – bridging different engineering teams as needed.
  • Technical experience – has a tech background with hands-on experience and is able to brainstorm with the team and architects.
  • Familiarity with gaming platforms/digital products – understanding system needs in such an environment.
  • Proficiency in agile/efficiency tools such as Jira and Confluence.
  • Ability to prioritize under pressure – balancing multiple collaborators and tight timelines.
  • Strong critical thinking and problem-solving skills – spotting opportunities and issues early.
  • Adaptability – prioritising tasks as business needs evolve.
  • Leadership – influencing teams without direct line management.

Why Aristocrat?

Aristocrat is a world leader in gaming content and technology, and a top-tier publisher of free-to-play mobile games. We deliver great performance for our B2B customers and bring joy to the lives of the millions of people who love to play our casino and mobile games. And while we focus on fun, we never forget our responsibilities. We strive to lead the way in responsible gameplay, and to lift the bar in company governance, employee wellbeing and sustainability. We’re a diverse business united by shared values and an inspiring mission to bring joy to life through the power of play.

We aim to create an environment where individual differences are valued, and all employees have the opportunity to realize their potential. We welcome and encourage applications from all people regardless of age, gender, race, ethnicity, cultural background, disability status or LGBTQ+ identity. EEO M/F/D/V
  • World Leader in Gaming Entertainment
  • Robust benefits package
  • Global career opportunities

Our Values
  • All about the Player
  • Talent Unleashed
  • Collective Brilliance
  • Good Business Good Citizen

Travel Expectations

None

Additional Information

This role is subject to mandatory background screening and regulatory approvals. As part of your employment with Aristocrat, you may be required to complete a criminal background check, submit fingerprints, and obtain licenses or registrations with applicable gaming regulatory authorities.

Aristocrat operates in a highly regulated environment and holds licenses in over 340 gaming jurisdictions worldwide. To meet our global compliance obligations, you will be required to provide the disclosure of relevant personal and background information to government agencies, sovereign nations/tribal regulators, and other applicable gaming regulatory bodies. This is a condition of Aristocrat’s gaming licenses. The specific information required may vary depending on the jurisdiction and project assignment.

At this time, we are unable to sponsor work visas for this position. Candidates must be authorized to work in the job posting location for this position on a full-time basis without the need for current or future visa sponsorship.
